findings.description: customerId/accountId UUIDs logged unmasked across 4 files at DEBUG/WARN — PDPA §22 violation.
findings.remediation: Extract IborCheckFilter.maskId() to shared LogMasking utility; replace all customerId={}/accountId={}/key={} log args; add regex masking unit test.

findings.description: No Logback masking filter present; defense-in-depth against future PII log additions absent.
findings.remediation: Create logback-spring.xml with regex pattern converter masking UUID + PAN-like digit sequences.

findings.description: JWT in sessionStorage — XSS-recoverable. Improvement over localStorage but residual risk. No XSS sinks in feature.
findings.remediation: File backlog ticket BC-DEBT-002 for HttpOnly cookie + BFF migration in v1.1. Non-blocking for demo.

findings.description: Privacy notice / consent UI deferred post-demo. Already tracked.
Future rate-limiting must be at ingress on JWT sub, NOT X-Forwarded-For at app layer.
findings.remediation: Document constraint in DevOps P1 NetworkPolicy spec.

metadata.notes: F-1 (HIGH PII-in-logs) + F-2 (MEDIUM missing masking filter) block G8. Loop to banking-refactoring for targeted fixes. F-3/F-4/F-5 acceptable with backlog tickets. G7 (banking-integration) already approved.
